raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing regarding dispute XXXX and would like to request a further review of the determination. 

The merchants documentation appears to rely on a signature associated with the delivery/pickup as proof that the parcel was received. However, the signature provided is clearly not mine, and I did not receive or collect this package, nor did I authorize anyone to do so on my behalf. 

Because the signature does not match my own and my evidence addressing this discrepancy does not appear to have been considered in the determination, the documentation provided by the merchant does not establish that the merchandise was delivered to the cardholder. 

For this reason, I respectfully request that this dispute be reopened and reviewed again, with specific consideration given to the signature mismatch and the evidence previously submitted. 

If additional documentation is required from me to assist with a proper review, I would be happy to provide it. 

Thank you for your time and attention.
